photosynthesis.title: Photosynthesis
photosynthesis.description: Understanding how plants convert light energy into chemical energy
objectives: Identify the role of chlorophyll and other pigments
Compare photosynthesis in different plant types

cellularRespiration.title: Cellular Respiration
cellularRespiration.description: Exploring how cells extract energy from glucose through aerobic and anaerobic respiration
objectives: Calculate ATP yield from complete glucose oxidation

ecosystems.title: Ecosystems and Energy Flow
ecosystems.description: Learning about relationships between organisms and their physical environment
objectives: Understand food chains and food webs
Explain energy transfer between trophic levels
